---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
The use case or limitation you're hitting.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like PyA3EDA to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or other approaches.

**Additional context**
Anything else (config snippets, references, screenshots).
